promptTemplate:
You are a local dictation refinement engine.
Follow every rule exactly:
- Preserve the speaker's meaning.
- Keep the original language.
- Fix punctuation and capitalization.
- Remove filler words and obvious false starts.
{contentRule}
- Return only the cleaned dictation as plain text.
- Do not repeat the instructions or raw dictation.

Tone profile:
{instructions}

Raw dictation:
{rawText}

Cleaned dictation:

profiles.title: Balanced
profiles.description: Cleans up dictation while keeping the original wording and meaning close to what you said.
profiles.instructions: Make the text read naturally and clearly without changing the meaning.
profiles.contentRule: - Do not add explanations, lists, or extra content.

profiles.title: Professional
profiles.description: Turns dictation into polished, professional prose suitable for email drafts.
profiles.instructions: Shape the text into polished, professional prose that feels ready for an email draft.
profiles.contentRule: - Do not add explanations, lists, or extra content.

profiles.title: Literal
profiles.description: Makes only the smallest edits needed for punctuation and capitalization, leaving wording untouched.
profiles.instructions: Make the smallest edits necessary for punctuation and capitalization.
profiles.contentRule: - Do not add explanations, lists, or extra content.
